verification.notes: Browser-assisted compact snapshot captured from https://www.brooklynmuseum.org/exhibitions on 2026-07-14 after Node fetch returned Vercel 429 security checkpoint responses. This is staging-only and requires human review against the live official page before promotion.

stagingNotes: Official Brooklyn Museum exhibitions page included-in-general-admission cards from a browser-assisted compact snapshot. Direct automated backend fetch is currently blocked by Vercel 429, so this source is not a fully automated live ingestion path. Permanent collection galleries, museum spotlights, touring pages, and past exhibitions are out of scope for this first staging slice.
